description: A department manager wants a report showing their department's expenses for the last quarter, broken down by GL account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent understands the user needs expense data for a specific department and timeframe.

nodes.task_description: Query the general ledger for all transactions matching the specified department and date range.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves all the relevant transactions.

nodes.task_description: Summarize the data by GL account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pivots the data to show total spend for each expense account.

nodes.task_description: Generate and send the report to the manager.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a spreadsheet with the requested data and emails it to the manager.
